comment: Config for the S9 organization shot (6s @ 24fps). Textures: put note-card PNGs (exported from the Lottie assets or any design tool) in organize/textures/ as note_00.png..note_13.png and matching timeline-row versions as row_00.png..row_13.png. backdrop.png = the frozen H7 close-up frame. Order of 'rows' = final top-to-bottom order of the timeline column.
